description: Focused decoder-depth follow-up sweep. Keeps the stripped and UPX-stripped config_decoder_test scope fixed, uses three repetitions, preserves the original decoder-depth baseline so it stays comparable to the earlier sweep_decoder_depth_r3 run, and tests only the maintained worker-prompt-shape follow-ups plus one validator-backed pipeline variant.

repo_default.description: Use the repo's mixed per-stage and per-role model defaults with no forced override.

budget.description: Force the cheapest cross-run model profile used in experiments. This changes model choice, not token budgets or runtime limits.

premium.description: Force the stronger cross-run model profile used in experiments. This changes model choice, not token budgets or runtime limits.

sweeps.description: Compare the maintained default worker prompts against the evidence-first overlay and the empty worker-role condition while holding the original decoder-depth baseline fixed.
Test whether adding the validator-backed planner-workers pipeline helps on the decoder-depth scope while leaving the baseline itself unchanged for comparison and mergeability.
